description: CB1 benchmark query typology — 4 scenario categories mapped to Axes A/B/C
benchmark: CB1: Evo_PRISM vs Snakemake vs Nextflow, 98 Kallisto bulk RNA-seq samples
reference: Inspired by EvolveMem [arXiv:2605.13941] per-question failure logging and 5-category QA breakdown

cache_miss.description: Cold-start: sample not in L1 cache, fresh QC+PCA computation required
cache_miss.example: First-run of all 98 Kallisto samples with empty in-memory cache

cache_hit.description: Warm-cache: sample result served directly from in-memory L1 semantic cache
cache_hit.example: Re-run of base 95 samples after initial cache population; zero recomputation

incremental.description: New sample added to existing cohort — only 3 new samples recomputed, 95 served from cache
incremental.example: Adding the 3 withheld samples to a 95-sample base cohort

stale_detection.description: Code/parameter change detection via HELIX tool_id versioning — which outputs need rerun
stale_detection.example: QC threshold change detected via register_tool() new tool_id; HELIX flags 98/98 stale vs 0/98 for competitors

per_query_schema.query_type: One of: cache_miss | cache_hit | incremental | stale_detection

note: Sample IDs are resolved dynamically from bulk_rna_data/Kallisto_v1/results_kallisto/ at runtime. Base samples = SAMPLES_ALL[:-3] (95); incremental samples = SAMPLES_ALL[-3:] (3 withheld).
